class.name: ScriptBacktraces
class.brief_description: A captured backtrace of all registered script languages.
class.description: [ScriptBacktraces] holds an already captured backtrace of all registered script languages, such as GDScript or C#, which are captured using [method Engine.capture_script_backtraces].

method.name: get_backtrace
method.description: Returns the captured [ScriptBacktrace] at the specified index.

method.name: get_backtrace_count
method.description: Returns the number of captured [ScriptBacktrace], which is always one per registered script language.
